texto: If only the know-how could be equalled by the will-to-serve, by compassion for human suffering cause by hunger and deficiency diseases, there is no reason why fully balanced diets consisting largely of plant-foods should not be made available for hundreds of millions of undernourished people in the West as well as in the Third World.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert G. Hart sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If only the know-how could be equalled by the will-to-serve, by compassion for human suffering ca…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, agroforestry, food, útil em momentos de food e hunger.
